name: Rescue Hamster
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You can banish this card from your Pendulum Zone; add 2 face-up Pendulum Monster Cards with the same name from your Extra Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Rescue Hamster" once per Duel.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card was Normal Summoned this turn and you have a face-up Level 5 or lower Pendulum Monster Card in your Extra Deck: You can Tribute this card; choose 1 face-up Level 5 or lower Pendulum Monster Card in your Extra Deck, and Special Summon 2 monsters from your Deck with the same name as that card, but they have their effects negated, also they are destroyed during the End Phase.
pend_eff: You can banish this card from your Pendulum Zone; add 2 face-up Pendulum Monster Cards with the same name from your Extra Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Rescue Hamster" once per Duel.
mnst_eff: If this card was Normal Summoned this turn and you have a face-up Level 5 or lower Pendulum Monster Card in your Extra Deck: You can Tribute this card; choose 1 face-up Level 5 or lower Pendulum Monster Card in your Extra Deck, and Special Summon 2 monsters from your Deck with the same name as that card, but they have their effects negated, also they are destroyed during the End Phase.
eff: If this card was Normal Summoned this turn and you have a face-up Level 5 or lower Pendulum Monster Card in your Extra Deck: You can Tribute this card; choose 1 face-up Level 5 or lower Pendulum Monster Card in your Extra Deck, and Special Summon 2 monsters from your Deck with the same name as that card, but they have their effects negated, also they are destroyed during the End Phase.

action: Adds from Extra Deck to hand
Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
